attacking_style: Not a primary attacker. Demonstrates capability to close dangerous late-race attacks from strong riders, indicating high-end speed/power reserve typically used for protective rather than offensive purposes.
team_tactics: Deployed as high-powered domestique despite having race-winning strength. Used to neutralize threats to team's sprinter/protected rider rather than pursue personal result. Dual-role capability evident.
terrain_preference: Performs strongly on one-day classic terrain where positioning and late-race surges matter. Capable of handling attacks that threaten team plans on rolling/punchy finales.
vulnerability: Team tactical decisions prioritize protecting other riders over personal ambitions despite having commentary-confirmed race-winning legs. Strength potentially wasted in domestique role.
key_patterns: Strongest rider in race relegated to domestique duties, closing attacks for teammates.
Capable of neutralizing dangerous late-race moves from quality attackers like Senechal.
Team celebrates while he performs selfless work, suggesting recurring tactical subordination.
form_trajectory: unknown: Single 2020 observation shows exceptional strength but no subsequent data to assess development or consistency
